# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI

on:
  push:
    branches:
      - main
  pull_request:
    branches:
      - main

jobs:
  build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2

      - name: Cache dependencies
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ${{ runner.tool_cache }}
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-dependencies-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-dependencies-

      - name: Cache pip packages
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        with:
          path: ${{ env.HOME }}/.cache/pip
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements.txt') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-pip-

      - name: Cache configuration files
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        with:
          path: |
            config1.yaml
            config2.yaml
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-configs-${{ hashFiles('**/config*.yaml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-configs-

      - name: Build
        run: |
          # Add build commands here

      - name: Save cache
        if: always()
        uses: actions/cache@v2
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ${{ runner.tool_cache }}
            ${{ env.HOME }}/.cache/pip
            config1.yaml
            config2.yaml
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-dependencies-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}-${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements.txt') }}-${{ runner.os }}-configs-${{ hashFiles('**/config*.yaml') }}
